title: Mannipaya Ena Kekathe Lyrics 8 Thottakal
stanzas:
kobam kondu neengaathe
endhan nenjam thaangaathe
anbu endrum theeraathe
ennai vittu pogaathe

Mannipaaya ena kaetkaathe
eppodhum enai neengaathe
eppodhum enai neengaathe
eppodhum enai neengaathe

kaalangal thorumey
koodave varuvaaye.
kaayangal aatrida
un karangalai tharuvaaye.

kaalangal maarume
veraethum maaraathe.
yaenguven thaangida
un tholgalai tharuvaaye.

nee illaatha naatkalum
illai endru aagumaa.
anbe endhan aayulum
unnai vittu neelumaa.

vaanam naalum paarkalaam
ellai indri pesalaam
neenda thooram pogalaam
anbu kondu vazhalaam.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and the pain of separation, highlighting the emotional turmoil of the characters.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In 8 Thottakkal, this song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the protagonists' emotional struggles and their bond.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Aparna Balamurali and Udhay Kannan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mannipaya Ena Kekathe was composed by Sundaramurthy KS.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 20, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mannipaya Ena Kekathe, the characters express their heartfelt emotions through a poignant melody that resonates with anyone who has experienced love and loss. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing and the desire to stay connected despite challenges. Its soothing composition and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection. This duet is a standout moment in 8 Thottakkal, making it a memorable piece for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannipaya Ena Kekathe from 8 Thottakkal is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the soulful voices of Aparna Balamurali and Udhay Kannan, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody. With Sundaramurthy KS's enchanting composition, it's a must-listen for anyone who cherishes romantic tunes.
stanzaMeanings: Don't ask me to surrender, never leave me.
I too will melt like the evening breeze, I will blend into the air.
Don't bring your anger, my heart can't bear it, love should never fade, don't leave me.
Don't ask me to surrender, never leave me, never leave me, never leave me.
Time will always come together, your hands will give me strength.
Time will change but won't change everything, I will endure, give me your support.
Will there be days without you? Will my life be complete without you?
We can see the sky every day, we can talk without limits, we can live with love.
Don't ask me to surrender, never leave me.
